rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration
Use assign only for implementation-level output bindings with visible features
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference visible model features
Generate equations and constants in component type annexes when bounds or relations are specified
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible inputs to visible outputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee syntax within annex agree blocks
Assign statements must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
Implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes
